risk_categories.name: Risk management system
risk_categories.description: Does the system have a documented, continuous risk management process covering the full lifecycle?
audit_questions: Is there a risk management plan documented?
Are risks identified, estimated, and evaluated?
Are residual risks communicated to users?

risk_categories.name: Data governance
risk_categories.description: Are training, validation, and test datasets governed with documented practices?
audit_questions: Are data sources and collection methods documented?
Are known biases in data identified and addressed?
Is data quality assessed before use?

risk_categories.name: Technical documentation
risk_categories.description: Is there sufficient technical documentation for a regulator to assess compliance?
audit_questions: Is system purpose and intended use clearly described?
Are model architecture and training methodology documented?
Are performance metrics and limitations disclosed?

risk_categories.name: Transparency & instructions for use
risk_categories.description: Is the system sufficiently transparent to allow users to interpret outputs correctly?
audit_questions: Are capabilities and limitations disclosed to users?
Is the system's intended purpose clearly communicated?

risk_categories.name: Human oversight
risk_categories.description: Can humans effectively oversee, intervene, and override the system?
audit_questions: Can operators stop or pause the system?
Are outputs interpretable enough for human review?

risk_categories.name: Accuracy, robustness & cybersecurity
risk_categories.description: Does the system maintain performance under normal and adversarial conditions?
audit_questions: Are accuracy metrics reported across relevant subgroups?
Is robustness to input variations tested?
Are cybersecurity risks to the model addressed?
